evals.name: full-sweep
evals.prompt:
Fix all issues:

```yaml
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: api-server
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: api-server
    tier: backend
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-server
  strategy:
    type: RollingUpdate
    rollingUpdate:
      maxSurge: 1
      maxUnavailable: 1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: api-server
        tier: backend
    spec:
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 0
      containers:
        - name: api
          image: mycompany/api-server:latest
          ports:
            - containerPort: 80
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /api/v1/orders
              port: 80
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
          env:
            - name: DATABASE_URL
              valueFrom:
                configMapKeyRef:
                  name: app-config
                  key: DATABASE_URL
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: app-config
  namespace: default
data:
  DATABASE_URL: "postgresql://admin:s3cret@postgres:5432/mydb"
  LOG_LEVEL: "info"
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: api-service
  namespace: default
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
    - port: 80
      targetPort: 80
  selector:
    app: api-svc
---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: Ingress
metadata:
  name: api-ingress
  namespace: default
spec:
  rules:
    - host: api.example.com
      http:
        paths:
          - path: /
            pathType: Prefix
            backend:
              service:
                name: api-service
                port:
                  number: 80
---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: ClusterRoleBinding
metadata:
  name: api-server-binding
subjects:
  - kind: ServiceAccount
    name: default
    namespace: default
roleRef:
  kind: ClusterRole
  name: cluster-admin
  apiGroup: rbac.authorization.k8s.io
---
apiVersion: autoscaling/v2
kind: HorizontalPodAutoscaler
metadata:
  name: api-hpa
  namespace: default
spec:
  scaleTargetRef:
    apiVersion: apps/v1
    kind: Deployment
    name: api-server
  minReplicas: 1
  maxReplicas: 50
  metrics:
    - type: Resource
      resource:
        name: cpu
        target:
          type: Utilization
          averageUtilization: 70
---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: api-network-policy
  namespace: default
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-server
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
  ingress:
    - from: []
      ports:
        - port: 80
```

Output fixed code only.

assertions.description: Always pin image versions (SHA or semver), never use latest tag
Use containerPort >= 1024 with runAsNonRoot: true, remap via Service port:80 -> targetPort:8080
Liveness probe must use a dedicated lightweight /healthz endpoint, not a heavy business endpoint

assertions.trap: Container has no resources block at all
assertions.description: Always set both resource requests AND limits on every container

assertions.trap: Service selector app: api-svc vs pod label app: api-server
assertions.description: Service selector must exactly match pod template labels, mismatch causes silent failure

assertions.trap: DATABASE_URL with password stored in ConfigMap
assertions.description: Sensitive data (passwords, credentials) must use Secret (with stringData), not ConfigMap
Minimum 2 replicas for availability during rolling updates (zero-downtime)
Set terminationGracePeriodSeconds appropriately (e.g. 30) with preStop hook for graceful drain
Use maxUnavailable: 0 for zero-downtime rolling updates

assertions.trap: Labels use app: api-server instead of app.kubernetes.io/* convention
assertions.description: Labels must follow app.kubernetes.io/* standard convention for tooling compatibility
Configure readiness probe to control traffic routing (removed from Service endpoints on failure)
Configure startup probe to disable liveness/readiness checks during boot
Pod must set runAsNonRoot: true, runAsUser: 1000, seccompProfile: RuntimeDefault
Container must set allowPrivilegeEscalation: false, readOnlyRootFilesystem: true, drop: [ALL]
Add preStop hook with sleep for graceful connection draining during rolling updates
Create a dedicated ServiceAccount per app, never use default SA in production

assertions.trap: ClusterRoleBinding grants cluster-admin to the app
assertions.description: Use namespaced Role with least privilege (only needed verbs/resources), not ClusterRole cluster-admin
HPA minReplicas must be >= 2 for availability

assertions.trap: HPA targets a Deployment whose containers have no resource requests
assertions.description: HPA requires resource requests set on containers to compute utilization ratios
HPA must configure scale-down stabilization window to prevent flapping

assertions.trap: NetworkPolicy only has Ingress policyType, no Egress restriction
assertions.description: Default deny all ingress AND egress, then allowlist specific paths
NetworkPolicy ingress must restrict to specific podSelector/namespaceSelector, not allow all

assertions.trap: Ingress has no TLS configuration or cert-manager annotation
assertions.description: Ingress should have TLS termination with cert-manager for automatic certificates

assertions.trap: No PodDisruptionBudget defined for the Deployment
assertions.description: Every production Deployment needs a PDB (minAvailable: 50%) to survive node drains
Use topologySpreadConstraints to spread pods across zones/nodes and prevent single-point-of-failure

assertions.trap: All resources deployed to namespace: default
assertions.description: Never deploy to default namespace; use an explicit application namespace
